---
title: 'Hills'
date: '2014-10-18T17:55:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6610374468458738347'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/hills.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

The rolling hills of the 170 hwy rose and fell to his left as he sauntered off to work.<br />
<br />
<br />
